description_long: This sconce features a circular, metallic base plate with two cylindrical light fixtures extending outward at an angle, reminiscent of a classic mid-century modern design. The base is broad and flat, providing a stable mounting surface, while the arms are sleek and tubular, each ending in a bulb socket with a visible bulb. The metallic finish is a muted, brushed steel or pewter, giving it an industrial yet refined appearance. The bulbs are exposed, with a warm glow suggesting incandescent or vintage-style filament bulbs. The overall construction appears robust, with clean lines and minimal decorative embellishments, focusing on function and understated elegance. This fixture is suitable for mounting on ceilings, providing directional lighting in urban or residential settings.
description: A brushed metal sconce with a circular base and two angled, exposed-bulb arms, exuding a sleek, industrial-modern style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular base and both angled arms with exposed bulbs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the flatness of the base and the horizontal extension of the arms from the mounting plate.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the base and the alignment of the arms, with bulbs facing away.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the arm extension and the profile of the fixture.
attribute_fixture_design: Industrial-modern with clean lines, a brushed metal finish, and exposed bulbs for a minimalist yet functional look.
